rule: Tracked JSON, TOML, YAML, and YML files are machine-readable surfaces. Each must be classified as schema-backed, typed-validator-backed, generated/derived, source-checkout diagnostic, or an explicit freeform-prohibited gap, and must also declare a storage class explaining why the artifact belongs in checked-in state instead of being regenerated, reconstructed, kept local, or removed.

entries.notes: This inventory is validated by scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py.

generated_mirrors.named_consumer: external agents and runtimes that look for the conventional llms.txt handoff file
generated_mirrors.checked_in_justification: Stable compatibility entrypoint for agents that cannot run package discovery before first contact.
generated_mirrors.ordinary_agent_route: AGENTS.md -> agentic-workspace start --format json -> summary/proof as needed
generated_mirrors.removal_or_demotion_path: remove when external-agent handoff conventions no longer require a stable root file

generated_mirrors.named_consumer: installed planning module lifecycle and root maintainer-surface renderers
generated_mirrors.checked_in_justification: Installed planning payload manifest used as the local source for generated weak-agent adapters.
generated_mirrors.freshness_check: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
generated_mirrors.ordinary_agent_route: agentic-workspace start --format json or summary --format json
generated_mirrors.removal_or_demotion_path: demote when installed planning lifecycle can reconstruct adapter metadata without a stable manifest path

generated_mirrors.named_consumer: weak-agent and source-checkout compatibility readers under tools/
generated_mirrors.checked_in_justification: Compatibility mirror for agents that inspect tools/ before package commands are available.
generated_mirrors.removal_or_demotion_path: remove when tools/ weak-agent adapters are no longer a supported first-contact shape

generated_mirrors.checked_in_justification: Small generated compatibility adapter for agents that need a Markdown route before running commands.
generated_mirrors.removal_or_demotion_path: remove when AGENTS.md plus compact commands cover weak-agent startup without a tools quickstart

generated_mirrors.checked_in_justification: Small generated compatibility adapter for agents that need a Markdown route map after quickstart.
generated_mirrors.removal_or_demotion_path: merge into or remove after AGENT_QUICKSTART if secondary routing stops lowering startup cost

generated_mirrors.checked_in_justification: Package payload source needed to install the planning manifest into target repos.
generated_mirrors.ordinary_agent_route: package consumers should use installed AGENTS.md and agentic-workspace start, not this payload path
generated_mirrors.removal_or_demotion_path: demote only if package install can generate the manifest from packaged contracts without a checked-in payload copy

generated_mirrors.named_consumer: planning source-checkout diagnostics and package maintainer tests
generated_mirrors.checked_in_justification: Source-checkout mirror proves package-maintainer adapter rendering without requiring install into a temp repo.
generated_mirrors.ordinary_agent_route: installed repo AGENTS.md -> agentic-workspace start --format json
generated_mirrors.removal_or_demotion_path: remove when maintainer tests can reconstruct this mirror from the package payload source on demand

generated_mirrors.named_consumer: planning source-checkout diagnostics and package maintainer tests
generated_mirrors.checked_in_justification: Source-checkout generated Markdown mirror for package maintainer compatibility checks.
generated_mirrors.ordinary_agent_route: installed repo AGENTS.md -> agentic-workspace start --format json
generated_mirrors.removal_or_demotion_path: remove when package maintainer checks render the Markdown adapter only in temporary output

generated_mirrors.named_consumer: planning source-checkout diagnostics and package maintainer tests
generated_mirrors.checked_in_justification: Source-checkout generated Markdown mirror for package maintainer compatibility checks.
generated_mirrors.ordinary_agent_route: installed repo AGENTS.md -> agentic-workspace start --format json
generated_mirrors.removal_or_demotion_path: remove when package maintainer checks render the Markdown adapter only in temporary output

generated_mirrors.named_consumer: generated TypeScript package tests and package publishing preparation
generated_mirrors.checked_in_justification: Generated package metadata is kept as a reviewable adapter output while multi-language generation matures.
generated_mirrors.removal_or_demotion_path: demote to generated-on-demand once publishing no longer requires checked-in generated package metadata
